propositions: Stamp denormalized author name+email plus an optional author_id onto every mutating event's envelope at all four composer sites.
author_id is included only when identity.resolve_current_identity resolves a current identity, and omitted otherwise.
A repo_root-keyed module-level cache ensures git-email lookup and resolve_current_identity each run at most once per repo_root.
Pre-change events lacking author_email/author_id must reduce byte-identical with no new keys, preserving replay back-compat.
Reducers surface author_email/author_id present-only at the same structural location each processor already places author.
author_email() must never raise and returns empty string when git config is unset or the git call fails.
